scripts.setup: npm ci && allow-scripts && lerna exec -- allow-scripts && npm run build:core
scripts.build:core: nx build @mashroom/mashroom-utils && nx build @mashroom/mashroom && nx build @mashroom/mashroom-json-schemas && nx build @mashroom/mashroom-portal-ui-commons
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build:plugins
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules/ packages/core/*/dist/ packages/core/*/lib/ packages/core/*/test-reports/ packages/core/*/test-data/ packages/core/*/node_modules/ packages/plugin-packages/*/dist/ packages/plugin-packages/*/node_modules/ packages/plugin-packages/*/test-reports/ packages/plugin-packages/*/node_modules/ packages/plugin-packages/*/test-data/ packages/plugin-packages-legacy/*/dist/ packages/plugin-packages-legacy/*/node_modules/ packages/plugin-packages-legacy/*/test-reports/ packages/plugin-packages-legacy/*/node_modules/ packages/plugin-packages-legacy/*/test-data/ packages/test/*/node_modules/ packages/test/*/data/ packages/test/*/log/ .nx/ lerna-debug.log
